response:
```sql
SELECT airport_code
FROM (
    SELECT
        departure_airport AS airport_code,
        COUNT(*) AS flight_count
    FROM flights
    GROUP BY departure_airport

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        arrival_airport AS airport_code,
        COUNT(*) AS flight_count
    FROM flights
    GROUP BY arrival_airport
) AS airport_flights
GROUP BY airport_code
ORDER BY SUM(flight_count) ASC
LIMIT 1;
```
